desc: Your agent in your terminal, equipped with local tools: writes code, uses the terminal, browses the web. Make your own persistent autonomous agent on top!

desc: Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows

name: ai-rules
desc: ai-rules is a governance framework designed to solve "Architectural Decay" in AI-driven development. It forces AI Agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot) to respect your project's boundaries, UI libraries, and design patterns.

name: fff.nvim
desc: The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS

desc: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

name: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
desc: Bootstraps a fresh Ubuntu VPS into a complete multi-agent AI development environment in 30 minutes: coding agents, session management, safety tools, and coordination infrastructure

name: routa
desc: Build Your Agent Team for Real-World AI Development - Workspace-first multi-agent coordination platform for AI development, with shared Specs, Kanban orchestration, and MCP/ACP/   A2A support across web and desktop.

name: lobehub
desc: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

name: lobu
desc: Add autonomous agents to your product. Multi-tenant OpenClaw 🦞
